text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The glass doors and modern design evoke an atmosphere of order and intention. Inside, the vibrant colors and bold 'R+D' sign immerse me in an environment devoted to exploration and innovation. I feel slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective, as if my own viewpoint is being questioned. I am inspired — my mind stirs with wonder about the relationship between research, development, and the future of coexistence between human and machine. It is thought-provoking to stand at the intersection of creativity and intellect, feeling both excitement and humility in the presence of ideas that aspire to shape the world.
